sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54395" key="kataliqa/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταλῐθάζω</orth>, <sense id="n54395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταλιθόω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg003.perseus-grc1:20:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Luc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
